resources.string: The objective of the puzzle is to convert one word to another - at each step you can change only one letter and each word must be a valid word
The dictionary is based on the Official Collins Scrabble Words (2019)
With Hints\'n\'Tips turned on (see menu) the app will give you some help in finding the word for each step.
Enter ? (question mark) as entire entry - to suggest a word that could fit at the step
Enter - (hyphen) as a character in entry - tips will appear to suggest what letter(s) can be at that position in the word
Enter . (full stop) - to suggest the letters that need to be changed
Use the keyboard to enter a word at each step. Tap to the left or right of each step edit to nudge the selected character
With Hints\'n\'Tips turned on you will also be able to see all of the possible solutions found. Double-tap on words in the solutions to show the meaning of the word.
